verdicts.note: Progressive public investment supports an expansionary direction, but the dossier lacks the comprehensive mechanisms needed for a maximal score.
Climate action is an explicit priority, but no specific maximal intervention is documented.
His elected Port Commission service is affirmative evidence of a proven public record, not a neutral experience profile.
The caregiver and small-business profile supports a strong outsider placement, but the sparse dossier warrants medium rather than high confidence.

missing.basis: Her explicit emphasis on parental decision-making supports a modest traditionalist lean on the social axis.

review_notes: All 11 original candidate-axis pairs were reviewed exactly once (7 upheld, 4 adjusted). One directly supported omitted axis is proposed.
